set.body: CLAUDE.md says every new exported op must be added to the quality-tracking.md coverage table, but the table is hand-maintained and out of sync. Add tools/sync-coverage-table.R that reads benchmark-regression.R op list + NAMESPACE exports, diffs against the table, updates in place or fails with a diff. Wire into R CMD check or a make target. Acceptance: sync in clean tree is no-op; adding a new exported op without updating fails.
set.title: Auto-sync coverage table in planning_docs/quality-tracking.md
